title: UACP Device Registration
description: Binds a device public key to a user identity key via an Ed25519 signature over the canonical CBOR of the registration fields.

device_id.description: RFC 4122 v4 UUID identifying this device.

device_public_key.description: Ed25519 raw public key (32 bytes), base64url-encoded without padding.

registered_at.description: Milliseconds since Unix epoch when this device was registered.

device_label.description: User-chosen human-readable label for this device, e.g. "Desktop".

registered_by.description: Identity public key (32 bytes, base64url) of the user who registered this device.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature (64 bytes, base64url) by registered_by over canonical CBOR of all fields except signature.
